text.title: Giving and Receiving Feedback Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by observable signal to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: follow LEARN: Listen → Empathize → Acknowledge → Respond → Next steps
deliver SBI in private; tag quadrant honestly
add Intent inquiry → SBII; cross-check candor_quadrant

text.example: direction=giving → impact_sign=negative → conclusion intent-inquiry-sbii → SBII message tagged radical-candor.
